title: Premise-free operational root theorem
statement: No admissible operational statement, denial, record, proof object or derivational object is nothing: absence presents no counterexample, while every presented counterexample is an occurrence.

candidate_grammar.generator: Partition every purported operational counterexample by whether it emits an identifiable presentation at the proof boundary.
candidate_grammar.boundary: All operational statements, denials, records and proof challenges, independent of their internal length or notation.

excluded_inputs: v2 source, certificates and answer tables
conventional ontology or logic as a premise
intended_certificate: Independent recomputation of the complete operational presentation partition.
